{{Infobox technique
| name = Full-body Enforcer technique
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Full-body Enforcer technique Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The full-body [[Enforcer technique]] is a versatile and common method of empowerment that enhances an individual's entire form. While these techniques are highly flexible and their specific properties are determined by the type of [[madra]] used, they generally lack the extreme specialization found in more focused techniques. They often manifest visually through external markings or radiating light, and their presence can be detected by anyone at the [[Jade stage]] or higher. Users may employ these techniques to increase their physical speed, enhance their spiritual resistance, provide stability through anchoring effects, or even facilitate rapid bodily healing. Some variations can distort a user's appearance to make their movements difficult to track or perceive. In combat, full-body [[Enforcer techniques]] differ from [[Enforcer]] attack techniques; while the latter focus on intensifying a single motion and can be more powerful, they are often clumsier and leave the user vulnerable to retaliation. Users must manage their [[madra]] carefully when employing these techniques, as maintaining them can be taxing on one's core and physical limits. Advanced practitioners may layer multiple techniques together or combine them with other forms of power to achieve greater effects.}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The full-body [[Enforcer technique]] is common and flexible.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Full-body [[Enforcement]] often radiates light or has external markings.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naian]]'s speed is powered by the full-body [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]]'s full-body [[Enforcer technique]] makes her sink deeper into the ground.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] uses a full-body [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Archlady]]'s full-body [[Enforcer technique]] is a smooth, blue-white flame.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Archlord man]]'s full-body [[Enforcer technique]] is a rough black-and-red blaze.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pride]] uses a basic full-body [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
